qry:select.name: qryDetail
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL(' SELECT PER.oi_personal, PE.f_ingreso, max(PE.c_nro_cuil) as c_nro_cuil, PER.d_apellido, PER.d_nombres, PE.c_estado_civil, PE.c_sexo, max(PE.e_numero_legajo) as e_numero_legajo, NAC.c_nacionalidad, PER.f_nacim, \'N\' as incapacidad, MAX(PE.c_categoria_ult) AS c_categoria_ult, MAX(PE.c_nro_documento) AS c_nro_documento, S.oi_sindicato, max(EMP.c_empresa) as c_empresa, SUM(TLP.n_totsret) as n_totsret, max(LIQ.e_periodo) as e_periodo FROM LIQ20_TOT_LIQ_PER as TLP, LIQ97_PERSONAL_EMP as PE, PER01_PERSONAL as PER, LIQ99_LIQUIDACION as LIQ, LIQ93_EMPRESAS as EMP, PER30_SINDICATOS as S, ORG12_NACIONALID as NAC JOIN TLP.oi_per_emp_ddo INNER PE.oi_per_emp_ddo, PER.c_personal INNER PE.c_personal, LIQ.oi_liquidacion_ddo INNER TLP.oi_liquidacion_ddo, LIQ.oi_empresa_ddo INNER EMP.oi_empresa_ddo, PE.c_sindicato INNER S.c_sindicato, PER.oi_nacionalidad LEFT OUTER NAC.oi_nacionalidad WHERE IsNotNULL(TLP.f_cierre) AND LIQ.e_periodo = { #SOURCE:@p_periodo } AND {%?(#SOURCE:@oi_sindicato=4 OR #SOURCE:@oi_sindicato=151) {% (S.oi_sindicato = 151 OR S.oi_sindicato = 4) %} {% S.oi_sindicato = {#SOURCE:@oi_sindicato}%} %} AND EMP.c_empresa = { #SOURCE:@c_empresa } GROUP BY PER.oi_personal, PER.d_apellido, PER.d_nombres, PE.c_estado_civil, PE.c_sexo, NAC.c_nacionalidad, PER.f_nacim, PE.f_ingreso, S.oi_sindicato ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: QRY_ADICIONALES
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL(' SELECT sum(VLC.n_valor_s) as n_valor_s, VLC.c_variable as c_variable, max(LIQ.e_periodo) as e_periodo FROM LIQ20_TOT_LIQ_PER as TLP, LIQ99_RECIBOS as REC, LIQ97_PERSONAL_EMP as PE, PER01_PERSONAL as PER, LIQ99_LIQUIDACION as LIQ, ORG03_EMPRESAS AS EMP, LIQ20_CONC_LIQ_PER as CL, LIQ20_VAR_LIQ_CONC as VLC JOIN LIQ.oi_liquidacion_ddo INNER REC.oi_liquidacion_ddo, REC.oi_tot_liq_per INNER TLP.oi_tot_liq_per, TLP.oi_per_emp_ddo INNER PE.oi_per_emp_ddo, PER.c_personal INNER PE.c_personal, EMP.c_empresa INNER PE.c_empresa, TLP.oi_tot_liq_per INNER CL.oi_tot_liq_per, CL.oi_conc_liq_per INNER VLC.oi_conc_liq_per WHERE LIQ.c_estado = \'F\' AND LIQ.e_periodo = {#SOURCE:@e_periodo} AND EMP.c_empresa = {#SOURCE:@c_empresa} AND PE.e_numero_legajo = {#SOURCE:@e_numero_legajo} AND (VLC.c_variable = \'aa_nsretsind\') GROUP BY PE.c_empresa, PE.e_numero_legajo, VLC.c_variable ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: qryDetailDir

EMPTY.mess: No se encontraron registros. Por favor valide que los legajos estén asociados al sindicato correcto y que las liquidaciones del período estén cerradas.
